sources.title: NVSS - Life Expectancy
sources.notes: Used to identify the latest published U.S. life-table release and the CDC download structure for annual Excel tables.

sources.title: Table 2. Life table for males: United States, 2023
sources.notes: Table 2 contains the male 2023 U.S. period life table used for baseline male annual death probabilities.

sources.title: Table 3. Life table for females: United States, 2023
sources.notes: Table 3 contains the female 2023 U.S. period life table used for baseline female annual death probabilities.

sources.title: Products - Data Briefs - Number 492 - March 2024
sources.notes: Provides U.S. mortality and life-expectancy context used in the methodology drawer and for baseline sanity checks.

sources.title: WHO guidelines on physical activity and sedentary behaviour: at a glance
sources.notes: Used to center activity questions around guideline-relevant weekly moderate and vigorous activity bands.

sources.title: Cigarette Smoking
sources.notes: Supports cigarette-smoking health-risk framing and anchors smoking as a major mortality driver.

sources.title: Light Cigarette Smoking Increases Risk of All-Cause and Cause-Specific Mortality: Findings from the NHIS Cohort Study
sources.notes: Used to calibrate current-smoking penalties and to ensure even light daily smoking materially raises mortality risk.

sources.title: Alcohol Use and Your Health
sources.notes: Supports alcohol-use question framing and non-protective modeling assumptions for higher weekly use and bingeing.

sources.title: About This Advisory
sources.notes: Supports conservative alcohol-risk modeling and the decision not to treat alcohol as longevity-protective.

sources.title: Consequences of Obesity
sources.notes: Supports obesity-related chronic disease linkage used for BMI band penalties and overlap guardrails.

sources.title: Deaths with Diabetes as Underlying Cause of Death
sources.notes: Supports diabetes as a direct all-cause mortality multiplier rather than only a proxy risk factor.

sources.title: Predicting Risk of cardiovascular disease EVENTs (PREVENT) Calculator
sources.notes: Anchors the optional clinical-basics question set around cardiovascular, kidney, and metabolic health factors without importing the licensed PREVENT source code.

sources.title: Resting heart rate and the risk of cardiovascular disease, total cancer, and all-cause mortality - A systematic review and dose-response meta-analysis of prospective studies
sources.notes: Supports resting heart rate as an optional clinical marker associated with all-cause and cardiovascular mortality in prospective cohorts.

sources.title: Ultra-processed foods and risk of all-cause mortality: an updated systematic review and dose-response meta-analysis of prospective cohort studies
sources.notes: Used to define monotonic ultra-processed-food intake penalties through broad consumption bands.

sources.title: Cohort Life Expectancy — 2025 OASDI Trustees Report
sources.notes: Defines SSA cohort life expectancy as projected death rates across the years a person reaches each future age.

sources.title: The 2025 Annual Report of the Board of Trustees of the Federal OASDI Trust Funds
sources.notes: Supports the intermediate mortality-improvement projection used to adjust baseline future-year hazards.
